resetPassword.errorDefault: Kugadzirisa password kwakundikana. Kubatana kwacho kungave kusina kushanda kana kuti kwapera nguva.

preferences.title: Ziviso uye Zvaunoda pakuona

preferences.emailNotificationsDesc: Gamuchira zviziviso zveemail kana paine mameseji matsva uye zviziviso zvekushambadzira.
preferences.smsNotificationsDesc: Gamuchira mameseji eSMS kuti uwane zviziviso zvakakosha.
preferences.pushNotificationsDesc: Gamuchira zviziviso zvekusundidzira kuti uwane ruzivo rwechizvino-zvino.
preferences.saveError: Pane chikanganiso chakaitika panguva yekuvandudza zvaunofarira.

deleteAccount.title: Bvisa Akaunti
deleteAccount.description: Kana wangodzima account yako, hapana kudzokera shure. Ruzivo rwako rwese, zvinyorwa, uye hurukuro zvichabviswa zvachose.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima account yako here?
deleteAccount.error: Takundikana kudzima account. Ndapota tarisa password yako woedza zvakare.

hero.title: Puratifomu Yekutengesa Mhuka Mhenyu
hero.subtitle: Puratifomu yekutengeserana mhuka mhenyu yakavimbika kupfuura dzose. Tenga uye tengesa mombe dzako nemakwai zvakachengeteka.

secure.title: Kutenga Kwakachengeteka
secure.description: Zvese zvakachengetedzwa. Ruzivo rwemutengesi nemutengi rwakasimbiswa.

variety.title: Rudzi Rwakakura rweZvigadzirwa
variety.description: Mombe, makwai, nezvimwewo. Tsvaga mhuka yauri kutsvaga zviri nyore.

support.title: Rutsigiro rwemazuva ese
support.description: Tinogara tiripo kuti tikubvunzei mibvunzo yenyu. Runhare rwedu rwekutsigirana rwuri kushanda.

cta.title: Tanga Izvozvi
cta.subtitle: Tora nzvimbo yako pachikuva apo zviuru zvevatengesi nevatengi vanosangana.

footer.tagline: Puratifomu yekutengeserana mhuka mhenyu yakavimbika kupfuura dzose muTurkey.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Kupinda neApple kuchatanga kushanda munguva pfupi iri kutevera.

faq.title: Mibvunzo Inowanzo bvunzwa
faq.description: Mhinduro dzemibvunzo yako inowanzo bvunzwa nezvepuratifomu yedu.

about.title: Nezvedu
about.subtitle: Puratifomu yekutengeserana mhuka mhenyu yakavimbika kupfuura dzose muTurkey.

mission.title: Basa Redu
mission.description: Nekuita kuti kutengeserana kwemhuka mhenyu kuve kwedhijitari, chinangwa chedu ndechekugadzira hukama hwakachengeteka, hwakajeka, uye hunoshanda pakati pevagadziri nevatengi.

vision.title: Chiono Chedu
vision.description: Kuva piyona mukuchinja kwedhijitari muchikamu chekurima uye kuva puratifomu yepasi rose mukutengeserana kwemhuka mhenyu.

trust.title: Kuvimba
trust.description: Kujeka uye kuvimbika zvakakosha mukutengeserana kwese.

quality.title: Hunhu
quality.description: Kuvandudzwa kunoramba kuripo kuti upe basa rakanakisisa.

contact.title: Kutaurirana
contact.subtitle: Ndapota taurai nesu kana muine mibvunzo.

form.title: Tinyorerei tsamba
form.name: Zita rako
form.subject: Musoro wenyaya
form.success: Meseji yenyu yatumirwa zvinobudirira. Tichakupindurai nekukurumidza sezvinobvira.
form.error: Pane chikanganiso chakaitika panguva yekutumira meseji. Edza zvakare.

acceptance.title: 1. Kugamuchirwa kweMitemo
acceptance.content: Nekushandisa webhusaiti iyi, unobvumirana nemitemo inotevera yekushandisa. Kana usingabvumirani nemitemo iyi, ndapota usashandise webhusaiti iyi.

services.title: 2. Mabasa
services.content: Kutengeserana kwezvipfuyo kunopa mukana wekutenga nekutengesa mhuka mhenyu. Zvese zvinoitwa papuratifomu ibasa remushandisi.

accounts.title: 3. Maakaundi Evashandisi
accounts.content: Unofanira kupa ruzivo rwakarurama uye rwechizvino-zvino kuti ugadzire account. Kuchengetedzeka kweakhawunti yako ibasa rako.

prohibited.title: 4. Mabasa Akarambidzwa
prohibited.content: Kushambadza kunotsausa, ruzivo rwenhema, hutsotsi, uye mabasa asiri pamutemo zvinorambidzwa zvachose.

liability.title: 5. Muganho weMutoro
liability.content: Puratifomu iyi haina mhosva yakananga yekutengeserana pakati pevashandisi. Kutengeserana kwese kunoitika pakati pemapato.

changes.title: 6. Shanduko
changes.content: Mitemo iyi inogona kuchinja pasina chiziviso. Shanduko dzichatanga kushanda ipapo ipapo kana yaburitswa.

collection.title: 1. Kuunganidza Ruzivo
collection.content: Kana ukagadzira account, tinounganidza ruzivo rwako rwepachivande rwakadai sezita rako, kero yeemail, uye nhamba yefoni. Tinogonawo kuunganidza ruzivo rusingazivikanwe maererano nekushandisa kwako saiti iyi.

usage.title: 2. Kushandiswa kweRuzivo
usage.content: Ruzivo rwatinounganidza runoshandiswa kupa masevhisi edu, kutarisira account yako, kuona kuti yakachengeteka, uye kukupa zvinopihwa zvinoenderana newe.

sharing.title: 3. Kugovana Ruzivo
sharing.content: Ruzivo rwako pachako haruzotengeswi kana kurendwa kune vamwe vanhu. Ruzivo rwako haruzogovaniswe kunze kwekunge zvichidikanwa nemutemo.

security.title: 4. Kuchengetedzwa
security.content: Matanho ekuchengetedza akajairika aripo ekuchengetedza data rako.

cookies.title: 5. Makuki
cookies.content: Webhusaiti yedu inoshandisa makuki kuti ivandudze ruzivo rwevashandisi. Unogona kugadzirisa zvaunoda pamakuki mubrowser yako.

rights.title: 6. Kodzero Dzako
rights.content: Pasi pemutemo weTurkey Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK), une kodzero yekuwana, kugadzirisa, uye kudzima ruzivo rwako rwepachivande.

metadata.title: Kutengeserana Kwezvipfuyo - Puratifomu Yekutengeserana Kwezvipfuyo Mhenyu
metadata.description: Puratifomu yekutengeserana mhuka mhenyu inovimbwa zvikuru pasi rose. Kutenga nekutengesa mhuka kwakachengeteka uye pachena.

about.title: Nezvedu
about.description: Dzidza nezve Kutengeserana Kwezvipfuyo. Puratifomu yakavimbika yekutengesa mhuka mhenyu.
about.keywords: about livestock trading, live animal platform, livestock trading company, trusted animal market

contact.title: Kutaurirana
contact.description: Tibatei. Chikwata chekubatsira vatengi cheLivestock Trading chakagadzirira kukubatsirai.
contact.keywords: livestock trading contact, animal trading support, customer service

terms.title: Mitemo Yekushandisa
terms.keywords: terms of use, livestock trading rules, platform conditions

privacy.title: Mutemo wekuchengetedza ruzivo
privacy.description: Mutemo wekuchengetedza ruzivo rwezvipfuyo. Dzidza kuti ruzivo rwako rwepachivande runodzivirirwa sei.
privacy.keywords: privacy policy, personal data protection, GDPR, livestock trading privacy

products.title: Zvigadzirwa
products.description: Tarisa zvinyorwa zvemhuka dziri mhenyu. Zviziviso zvinovimbika zvemombe, makwai, nezvimwe.
products.keywords: live animal listings, cattle for sale, sheep for sale, goats for sale, livestock listings, poultry listings, animal market

sellers.title: Vatengesi
sellers.description: Tsvaga vatengesi vemhuka vakavimbika. Maprofile emutengesi akasimbiswa uye wongororo.
sellers.keywords: animal sellers, trusted sellers, verified seller profiles, live animal sellers

transporters.title: vatakuri
transporters.description: Tsvaga makambani ekutakura mhuka. Kutakurwa kwemhuka mhenyu kwakachengeteka uye kwehunyanzvi.
transporters.keywords: animal transport, livestock carriers, live animal transportation, animal shipping

search.title: Tsvaga
search.description: Tsvaga pakati pemhuka dziri mhenyu. Kutsvaga kuri nyore nesarudzo dzekusefa nekusarudza.
search.keywords: animal search, livestock search, find animals, animal filter

faq.title: Mibvunzo Inowanzo bvunzwa
faq.description: Mibvunzo nemhinduro zvinowanzo bvunzwa nezvekutengeserana kwezvipfuyo.
faq.keywords: FAQ, livestock trading questions, animal trading help

productDetail.title: {title} - Zviri Kutengeswa
productDetail.description: Zviri kutengeswa mu {title} - {city}. Dzvanya kuti uwane ruzivo rwakadzama uye ruzivo rwekuonana.

sellerDetail.title: {zita} - Profile yeMutengesi
sellerDetail.description: Profayiro yemutengesi we {name}. Ongororo, zvinyorwa, uye ruzivo rwekuonana.

transporterDetail.title: {zita} - Profile yeMutakuri
transporterDetail.description: {name} purofayi yemutakuri. Nzvimbo dzebasa, ongororo, uye ruzivo rwekuonana.

home.title: Live Animal Trading Platform | Trusted Livestock Trading
home.description: The world's most trusted live animal trading platform. Buy and sell cattle, sheep, goats and more safely. Verified sellers, transparent prices.
home.keywords: live animal sale, animal trading platform, cattle sale, sheep sale, goat sale, livestock, poultry, online animal market, trusted livestock trading, animal listings

pricing.title: Pricing | Membership Plans
pricing.description: Livestock Trading membership plans and pricing. Highlight your animal listings with free and premium packages.
pricing.keywords: pricing, membership plans, premium membership, animal listing price, boost package

metadata.keywords: live animal, livestock trading, animal buying selling, cattle sale, sheep sale, goat sale, livestock, poultry, farm animals, animal market, online animal sale

boost.title: Wedzera
boost.noBoostsDesc: Tenga pasuru yekusimudzira zvinhu kuti iratidze zvigadzirwa zvako.
boost.availableOnMobile: Kutenga kunogona kuitwa kuburikidza neapp yefoni
boost.listingLimitReached: Wasvika pamuganho wekunyora kwako. Simudzira hurongwa hwako.

admin.title: Panera reVatungamiriri
admin.subscriptionPlansDescription: Ronga zvirongwa zvekunyorera, mitengo, uye maficha.
admin.boostPackagesDescription: Ronga mapakeji ekuwedzera, mitengo, uye marongero enguva.

admin.exchangeRatesDescription: Ona mitengo yese yekutsinhana mari uye mamiriro ayo ekuvandudza.
admin.exchangeRateInfo: Mitengo yekutsinhana mari inovandudzwa otomatiki maawa matanhatu ega ega kuburikidza nebasa reHangfire.
